title: Canonicalization data (LLM output)
description: The ONLY thing the canonicalization LLM emits (ADR-0006): a small mapping table, never the transcript body. A pure apply() function rewrites the Canonical IR from (global clusters + this mapping). llama.cpp enforces this schema via GBNF/JSON-schema-constrained decoding (ADR-0004), so output is always valid.

speaker_map.description: One entry per canonical speaker id the model could label. Ids not present are left as fallback (Speaker A/B/C).

term_map.description: Canonical spelling for names/jargon Whisper rendered inconsistently across chunks. May be empty.
